contexts.context: ...I wanted to write and tell you that the <mark>technical</mark> word for buddle is Erzwaschtrog.  I hope there...
...your dictionary doesn't give it, the German for the <mark>technical</mark> word buddle (page I, near bottom) is Erzwaschtrog ....
...and the sequel written in German. This presents <mark>technical</mark> problems. For example, and now my questions to you...
